title: Contact L+H MarketingServices GmbH
content: Whether you have a concrete project in mind or just a question: reach out to us – we are happy to support you with your marketing services.

contact_details.title: Contact details
contact_details.contact_info: You can also reach us via the contact form – we will forward your request internally and we will come back to you.

on_side.title: On site in Nuremberg
on_side.content: Our office in Nürnberg is easily accessible both by public transport and by car. Detailed step-by-step directions can be found on our directions page.

contact_form.title: Send us a message
contact_form.name: Name
contact_form.subject: Subject
contact_form.agreement: I agree that my data will be used to process my request. Further information can be found in the privacy policy.

error.name: Please enter your name.
error.valid_mail: Please enter a valid email address.
error.consent: Please confirm that you agree to be contacted.
error.general: Please check the highlighted fields and try again.

contact_form.success: Thank you for your message. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

next_steps.title: What happens next?
next_steps.subtitle: We want your request to land directly with the right people. Here is how we typically handle incoming messages.

steps.name: Step 1
steps.title: Receipt & pre-check
steps.content: We receive your message and perform a quick pre-check to see which department or contact person is best suited to handle your request.

steps.name: Step 2
steps.title: Clarification & preparation
steps.content: If necessary, we might ask for a few additional details to fully understand your needs and prepare relevant information or options.

steps.name: Step 3
steps.title: Response & next steps
steps.content: You receive a personal response with concrete next steps – whether it's an offer, a proposal for a meeting or a direct solution.

why_contact.title: A partner that speaks your language
why_contact.subtitle: From concept to implementation – we accompany your marketing projects with experience, creativity and reliable project management.

tiles.title: Experience & reliability
tiles.content: Many years of experience in marketing services and project realization – with a strong focus on efficient, reliable processes.

tiles.title: Personal contact
tiles.content: No anonymous ticket system – your request is handled by real people who know your project and stay in touch with you.

tiles.title: Clear next steps
tiles.content: We don't leave you with abstract ideas – we propose concrete next steps, timelines and implementation options.

CTA.title: We are just one message or one call away.
CTA.content: Use the contact form above, send us an e-mail directly or call us – together we will find the right way to support your project.
